title: Part 6 – Texte à trous : rapport financier trimestriel
instructions: Lisez la note et choisissez le mot ou le groupe de mots qui convient pour chaque numéro.
passage:
To: Department Heads
From: Finance Office
Subject: Q3 Financial Report

The Q3 financial report {{1}} now available on the shared drive for your review.

Please note that overall revenue increased by eight percent compared to Q2, {{2}} expenses also rose slightly due to higher shipping costs.

{{3}} you have any questions about the figures in your department's section, please contact the finance team before Friday.

A meeting will be held next week to discuss the report {{4}} detail.

questions.explanation: Sujet singulier "The Q3 financial report" : "is now available".
Idée de contraste : les revenus ont augmenté bien que les dépenses aient aussi augmenté : "although".
Structure conditionnelle introduisant une instruction : "If you have any questions...".
